nodes.title: VIVID HEALTH - IMMUNE - Allergy Control 60 Capsules
nodes.description: Stop Surviving Allergy Season. Start Managing It. Hay fever, dust sensitivity, pet dander, food reactants — if your immune system fires up at the wrong things, every day becomes a management exercise. Vivid Health Allergy Control is a herbal and nutritional formula designed to calm the inflammatory cascade behind allergic reactions — naturally, without the sedation and side effects of antihistamines. How Allergies Work (And Why Most Products Don't Fix Them) Allergies are an overreaction by the immune system. When you're exposed to a trigger, your body releases histamine — causing the sneezing, itching, watery eyes, and congestion you know too well. Standard antihistamines block histamine receptors after the fact. This formula takes a different approach: it helps modulate the immune response upstream — reducing the tendency to overreact in the first place. For people looking for a natural allergy supplement in South Africa, Allergy Control is a serious alternative to the pharmacy aisle. Key Benefits Reduces histamine response — targeted ingredients help stabilise mast cells, the source of histamine release Anti-inflammatory action — addresses the inflammatory cascade that drives allergy symptoms Supports respiratory tract lining — helps reduce mucosal irritation in the sinuses and airways Non-sedating — unlike pharmaceutical antihistamines, no brain fog or drowsiness Year-round use — safe for daily use as part of an ongoing allergy management protocol Supports gut-immune connection — a healthy gut barrier reduces systemic immune hyperreactivity Built for SA Conditions South Africa has some of the highest rates of allergic disease on the continent — driven by high pollen counts, urban pollution, and dietary patterns. This formula was designed with that context in mind. It's not adapted from a Northern Hemisphere product; it's built for the SA environment. Works Best As a Stack For stronger allergy support, combine Allergy Control with Vivid Health Quercetin Complex (a natural mast cell stabiliser) and Buffered C (which has natural antihistamine properties at therapeutic doses). This is the basis of the Vivid Allergy Stack. How to Use Take 1–2 capsules daily with water. During peak allergy season, 2 capsules/day is recommended. 60 capsules per bottle. Vivid Health IMMUNE — Your Defence, Dialled In The IMMUNE range addresses the full spectrum of immune function — from acute infection defence to chronic overreaction management. Allergy Control is the flagship product for immune hyperreactivity — a condition that affects millions of South Africans and gets surprisingly little attention in the supplement space. This product is not a replacement for prescribed allergy medication in severe cases. If you have asthma or anaphylaxis risk, consult your healthcare provider. Safe for long-term daily use in otherwise healthy individuals.

nodes.title: VIVID HEALTH - STAY VIVID - Griffonia (5-HTP) 60 Capsules
nodes.description: Feel More Like Yourself. Griffonia (5-HTP) for Mood, Sleep, and Mental Clarity. If your mood is flat, sleep is patchy, or your mind won't quiet down at night — your serotonin system might need support. Vivid Health Griffonia (5-HTP) is derived from the seeds of the Griffonia simplicifolia plant and provides a natural precursor to serotonin and melatonin — two of the most critical molecules for emotional balance and restorative sleep. What Is 5-HTP and Why Does It Matter? 5-HTP (5-Hydroxytryptophan) is the direct precursor to serotonin — the neurotransmitter at the centre of mood regulation, appetite control, and emotional stability. Unlike tryptophan (which requires an extra conversion step), 5-HTP crosses the blood-brain barrier efficiently and gets to work faster.
